# Smart Library Manager

A Task Management App with AI-powered prioritization helps individuals and teams organize, track, and complete tasks efficiently. It uses AI to automatically prioritize tasks based on deadlines, importance, and workload. The app also supports team collaboration by allowing users to assign tasks, share updates, and track progress in real time, improving productivity and workflow management.

## Generated by AppForge

This project was generated using AppForge — an AI-powered app builder.

## Getting Started

```bash
npm install
npm run dev
```

## Build

```bash
npm run build
```

## Docker

```bash
docker build -t smart-library-manager .
docker run -p 3000:80 smart-library-manager
```
